sandboxFiles.name: Daily_Summary_2026-07-14.md
sandboxFiles.content:
Here is your daily briefing:

### Active Projects & Focus Areas

**Google Drive AI Creation Flow**
You spent a highly collaborative session refining the prototype for the new Google Drive AI experience. Key achievements include:
*   Rebuilding the **Folder Detail View** using a 3D flip-card metaphor (Coverslide on the front; folder contents and a summarized timeline on the back).
*   Implementing a chronological, ChatGPT-style sidebar grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, etc.).
*   Developing the collaborative **Thread Tab** detailing interactive history between you, Linh, Sam, and the Drive AI.
*   Adding `AGENT.md` support for external AI agent context, alongside an interactive "Ask Gemini" chat dock.
[📄 chat1.md](https://drive.google.com/open?id=15B4_jJOjQPtdGmqhVePf0yVo-6LVSuME)

**Workspace Studio Survey Research**
You are tracking the Workspace UX Research plan aimed at understanding consumer "Efficiency Stacks" and AI skill preferences. The survey targets 500 US responses to rank both practical utility skills (like Calendar Brief) and novelty features (like Fantasy Mapping).
[📄 WS Studio flows and skill consumer needs and value drivers - Survey Design](https://drive.google.com/open?id=13QLEWKifgyo6Js34kaowkMW8WmYXfrttOs8794atZ8Q)

**Sprint Check-In Preparation**
Prepare to present these accomplishments for the final day check-in of the WS Projects Sprint. 
[📄 WS Projects Sprint - Final Day Check-in (go/ws-projects-final)](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1FFMXwSoQDxHJG6RPRT2kQyXnfQGQMvoXLFTwZvKJDk0)

### Key Teammate Feedback & Actions
*   **Design Alignment:** Sam clarified that the orange blurred dot on the slide cover is a decorative brand mark ("the locked element") rather than an active UI element.
*   **Survey Progress:** Review the stakeholder feedback from Ali, Rotimi, and Jill to finalize the survey design before launch.
